helpFeedback.title: Help & Feedback

faq.gs1q: How often are reading articles updated?
faq.gs1a: New curated English articles are added daily. Open the home page to see the latest content in the carousel.
faq.gs2a: Tap a story card on the home page to enter the chapter list. Complete dialogue and exercises in order, learning English alongside the characters.
faq.gs3q: How is the streak count calculated?
faq.gs3a: Any learning activity (studying words, doing exercises, reading articles, etc.) counts as one day. The streak resets if you miss a day.
faq.w1q: Is the vocabulary test accurate? How long does it take?
faq.w1a: The test uses an adaptive algorithm covering all levels from A1 to C2, with 50-80 questions. It takes about 5 minutes and helps recommend the right word book for you.
faq.w2q: How do I switch word books?
faq.w2a: Go to the Learn tab → Vocabulary → tap the 'Switch' button on your word book card to select a new one.
faq.w3q: What learning modes are available for new words?
faq.w3a: Three modes: Smart Recommendation (matched to your level), Random (random order), and A-Z (alphabetical order).
faq.w4q: When should I learn new words vs. review?
faq.w4a: The system schedules reviews based on the forgetting curve. If there are words due for review, it's recommended to review first before learning new words.
faq.w5q: How do I save words to favorites?
faq.w5a: Tap the bookmark icon next to any word during learning or review to add it to your favorites. You can also save words from search results.
faq.w6q: What's the difference between Favorites and Difficult Words?
faq.w6a: Favorites are words you manually save. Difficult Words are automatically flagged by the system based on your learning performance for targeted review.
faq.w7q: Will my progress be lost if I switch word books?
faq.w7a: No. Each word book's progress is saved independently. Switching back will restore your previous progress.
faq.p1q: How is the pronunciation star rating determined?
faq.p1a: 0 stars = not practiced, 1 star = practiced but below 80, 2-4 stars = multiple scores above 80, 5 stars = 5 scores above 90. Keep practicing to earn full stars.
faq.p2q: What do I need for pronunciation practice?
faq.p2a: You need to grant microphone access. We recommend practicing in a quiet environment to ensure accurate assessment.
faq.g1q: How many grammar topics are available?
faq.g1a: There are currently 69 grammar topics organized by CEFR levels from A1 to C2, progressing from basic to advanced.
faq.g2q: What's the difference between grammar lessons and exercises?
faq.g2a: Lessons explain grammar rules and concepts. Exercises help you practice and apply what you've learned. We recommend completing the lesson before doing exercises.
faq.ai1q: How do I unlock AI characters?
faq.ai1a: Some characters require story progress to unlock, while others require a Basic subscription or above. Check the lock icon on each character card for specific requirements.
faq.ai2a: Yes. Each character's conversation is persistent. You can continue where you left off, and the AI remembers your previous chats.
faq.ai3q: Does AI chat use my quota?
faq.ai3a: Yes, AI chat consumes your AI conversation quota. New users get a 3-day Basic trial. After that, a paid subscription is required.
faq.rs1a: Free users can read article text. AI explanations, key vocabulary analysis, and other premium features require a Basic subscription or above.
faq.rs2q: How many story episodes are there? Will more be added?
faq.rs2a: Stories are continuously updated. Each series contains multiple chapters. You can view all available series and chapters in the story list.
faq.s1q: What's the difference between free and paid plans?
faq.s1a: Free plan includes: 20,000+ core vocabulary, vocabulary test, 69 grammar topics, and article text. Paid plans add: AI chat, interactive stories, pronunciation assessment, translation, AI article explanations, and more.
faq.s2q: What's the difference between Basic, Pro, and Max?
faq.s2a: All three plans have identical features. The difference is monthly quota: Basic has standard quota, Pro has 2x, and Max has 5x. Choose based on your usage frequency.
faq.s3q: What happens when my quota runs out?
faq.s3a: AI-powered features will be paused. You can upgrade to a higher plan for more quota, or wait for the next billing cycle when it resets automatically.
faq.s4q: Can I switch from monthly to annual billing?
faq.s4a: Yes. Annual plans offer a discount. Switch to the 'Annual' tab on the plan selection page to see pricing. The system will prorate based on remaining days.
faq.s5q: How do I upgrade or renew?
faq.s5a: Go to Profile → tap the quota card or subscription badge at the top → this takes you to the plan selection page to upgrade or renew.
faq.s6a: Alipay is currently supported. More payment methods will be added in the future.
faq.s7q: Will I lose my data if my subscription expires?
faq.s7a: No. All your learning records, word progress, and saved content are permanently stored. Only premium features are paused — they resume immediately upon renewal.
faq.as1q: How do I switch between Chinese and English?
faq.as1a: Go to Profile → App Settings → Language to switch between Chinese and English.
faq.as2q: How do I switch between dark and light mode?
faq.as2a: Go to Profile → App Settings → Theme to choose dark or light mode.
faq.as3q: How do I bind my phone number?
faq.as3a: Go to Profile → Account Security → Bind Phone, then follow the prompts to verify your phone number.
faq.as4q: Does my data sync across devices?
faq.as4a: Yes. After logging in with the same account, your data syncs automatically. The app works offline too — data uploads when you're back online.
faq.as5a: You can submit feedback at the bottom of this page, or email us directly at feedback@coderhythm.cn. We'll respond as soon as possible.
